items.name_en: 💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
items.name_cn:
💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
[Guaranteed imported top-grain cowhide, no split leather, no microfiber]
Saddle Long Wallet with Zipper
Black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide
Number: 2ADBC315YKK_H00N
This saddle long wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted with black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide, featuring contrasting topstitching, it reinterprets the classic saddle silhouette, featuring a metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo on the front for a touch of class. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double-layer cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage space. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal companion for daily use.
Main material: Cowhide
Lining: Cowhide, Technical fabric
Internal zip pocket
12 card slots
Double-layer cash compartment
Front features metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo
Interior features Dior embossed logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 19.8 x 11 cm (Length x Height)
Fits bank cards

items.name_en: B's new medium woven cardholder is an essential everyday item. Made of cowhide with a smooth texture. It has 6 card slots and a middle compartment for cash. Lightweight and compact, perfect for small bags. Available in many colors. Dimensions: 11 x 7.5 cm

items.name_cn:
Beige Large Monogram Clutch
No.: 2esca490yxl_h27e_tu
Product Info
This A5 clutch is an elegant and minimalist accessory. Crafted from beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the brand's classic pattern with a Dior logo on the front and grained calfskin trim. The zip compartment features a phone slip pocket and four card slots. Can be carried in hand or placed inside a handbag.
Beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric
Front with metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior with embossed Dior logo
Metal-plated brass zipper
Internal slip pocket
4 card slots
Size Info
Dimensions: 26.5x17.5 cm (LxH)
Fits A5 and US letter size documents # Fabric
